project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard
build_system: pip (no pyproject.toml yet - creating one as part of this task)
test_framework: No formal test framework yet - will add basic tests with pytest
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e . (editable install), 2. augur --help (CLI works), 3. augur list-personas (shows 17+ personas), 4. python -c 'from augur.registry import AgentRegistry; r = AgentRegistry(); print(len(r.get_all()))' (imports work), 5. python -c 'from scanner.personas.registry import AgentRegistry' (backward compat shims work)
environment_constraints: Python 3.9.25 available. pip available. No Docker needed for this task. Network access for pip install.
contribution_requirements: No formal CONTRIBUTING.md. Code uses Chinese comments and docstrings. Maintain backward compatibility with scanner.* imports.
key_patterns: 1. All agents inherit BaseAgent and implement analyze(context: MarketContext) -> AgentResponse. 2. AgentRegistry auto-discovers all 17 hardcoded agents + YAML personas from personas/custom/. 3. DecisionCoordinator orchestrates multi-agent analysis and consensus. 4. scanner/__init__.py re-exports all public symbols. 5. dashboard/app.py uses 'from scanner.personas.registry import ...' and 'from scanner.personas.base import ...'
directory_structure: scanner/ - analysis engine with personas/*.py (17 agents + base + registry), persona_loader.py. dashboard/ - FastAPI web app. config/ - agents.yaml model config. personas/ - markdown docs + custom/*.yaml. skills/ - SKILL.md files per agent. scripts/ - data fetchers.
